mourning.gloss: to express sadness or sorrow for
mourning.definition: To express sadness or sorrow for; to grieve over (especially a death).

mousse.definition: An airy pudding served chilled, particularly chocolate mousse.

mucus.gloss: slippery secretion from the lining of the mucous membranes
mucus.definition: A slippery secretion from the lining of the mucous membranes.

muscle.gloss: contractile form of tissue which animals use to effect movement
muscle.definition: A contractile form of tissue which animals use to effect movement.

mussel.gloss: any of several groups of bivalve shellfish with elongated
mussel.definition: Any of several groups of bivalve shellfish with elongated, asymmetrical shells

naan.definition: A type of round, flat bread baked in a tandoor popular in South and Central Asian cuisine.

naval.gloss: of or relating to a navy
naval.definition: Of or relating to a navy.

nave.gloss: middle or body of a church
nave.definition: The middle or body of a church, extending from the transepts to the principal entrances.

navel.gloss: indentation or bump remaining in the abdomen of mammals where the umbilical cord was attached before birth
navel.definition: The indentation or bump remaining in the abdomen of mammals where the umbilical cord was attached before birth.

nee.gloss: used when giving the maiden name of a woman
nee.definition: Used when giving the maiden name of a woman.

need.definition: A requirement for something; something needed.

nickel.gloss: silvery elemental metal with an atomic number of 28 and symbol ni
nickel.definition: A silvery elemental metal with an atomic number of 28 and symbol Ni.

night.definition: The period between sunset and sunrise, when a location faces far away from the sun, thus when the sky is dark.

non.definition: To no extent, in no way.

noose.definition: An adjustable loop of rope, such as the one placed around the neck in hangings, or the one at the end of a lasso.

not.gloss: unary operation on logical values that changes true to false
not.definition: A unary operation on logical values that changes true to false, and false to true.

nous.definition: The mind or intellect, reason, both rational and emotional

nun.gloss: member of a christian religious community of women who live by certain vows and usually wear a habit
nun.definition: A member of a Christian religious community of women who live by certain vows and usually wear a habit, (specifically) those living together in a cloister.

oar.gloss: type of lever used to propel a boat
oar.definition: A type of lever used to propel a boat, having a flat blade at one end and a handle at the other, and pivoted in a rowlock atop the gunwale, whereby a rower seated in the boat and pulling the handle can pass the blade through the water by repeated strokes against the water's resistance, thus moving the boat .

ooze.definition: Tanning liquor, an aqueous extract of vegetable matter (tanbark, sumac, etc.) in a tanning vat used to tan leather.

oral.definition: A spoken test or examination, particularly in a language class.

ore.gloss: rock or other material that contains valuable or utilitarian materials
ore.definition: Rock or other material that contains valuable or utilitarian materials; primarily a rock containing metals or gems for which it is typically mined and processed.

overdo.definition: To do too much; to exceed what is proper or true in doing; to carry too far.

overdue.definition: Late; especially, past a deadline or too late to fulfill a need.

oversee.definition: To survey, look at something in a wide angle.

paean.definition: A chant or song, especially a hymn of thanksgiving for deliverance or victory, to Apollo or sometimes another god or goddess; hence any song sung to solicit victory in battle.

pail.definition: A vessel of wood, tin, plastic, etc., usually cylindrical and having a handle -- used especially for carrying liquids, for example water or milk; a bucket (sometimes with a cover).

pain.definition: An ache or bodily suffering, or an instance of this; an unpleasant sensation, resulting from a derangement of functions, disease, or injury by violence; hurt.

pair.gloss: two similar or identical things taken together
pair.definition: Two similar or identical things taken together; often followed by of.

pairing.gloss: to group into one or more sets of two
pairing.definition: To group into one or more sets of two.

palate.definition: The roof of the mouth; the uraniscus.

palette.gloss: thin board on which a painter lays and mixes colours
palette.definition: A thin board on which a painter lays and mixes colours.

pallet.definition: A portable platform, usually designed to be easily moved by a forklift, on which goods can be stacked, for transport or storage.

pane.gloss: individual sheet of glass in a window
pane.definition: An individual sheet of glass in a window, door, etc.

papa.definition: Dad, daddy, father; a familiar or old-fashioned term of address to one’s father.

pare.gloss: to remove the outer covering or skin of something with a cutting device
pare.definition: To remove the outer covering or skin of something with a cutting device, typically a knife

paring.gloss: to remove the outer covering or skin of something with a cutting device
paring.definition: To remove the outer covering or skin of something with a cutting device, typically a knife

pea.definition: A plant, Pisum sativum, member of the legume (Fabaceae) family.

peace.definition: A state of tranquility, quiet, and harmony; absence of violence. For instance, a state free from civil disturbance.

peak.definition: A point; the sharp end or top of anything that terminates in a point; as, the peak, or front, of a cap.

peal.definition: A loud sound, or a succession of loud sounds, as of bells, thunder, cannon, shouts, laughter, of a multitude, etc.

pear.gloss: edible fruit produced by the pear tree
pear.definition: An edible fruit produced by the pear tree, similar to an apple but elongated towards the stem.

pedal.gloss: lever operated by one s foot that is used to control or power a machine or mechanism
pedal.definition: A lever operated by one's foot that is used to control or power a machine or mechanism, such as a bicycle or piano

peddle.definition: To sell things, especially door to door or in insignificant quantities.

peek.definition: To look slyly, or with the eyes half closed, or through a crevice; to peep.

peel.gloss: skin or outer layer of a fruit
peel.definition: (usually uncountable) The skin or outer layer of a fruit, vegetable, etc.

peon.definition: A lowly person; a peasant or serf; a labourer who is obliged to do menial work.

pharaoh.definition: The supreme ruler of Ancient Egypt; a formal address for the sovereign seat of power as personified by the 'king' in an institutional role of Horus son of Osiris; often used by metonymy for Ancient Egyptian sovereignty

phenol.definition: A caustic, poisonous, white crystalline compound, C6H5OH, derived from benzene and used in resins, plastics, and pharmaceuticals and in dilute form as a disinfectant and antiseptic; once called carbolic acid.

phew.gloss: used to express relief of tension
phew.definition: Used to express relief of tension, fatigue, or surprise.

phosphorus.gloss: chemical element with an atomic number of 15
phosphorus.definition: A chemical element (symbol P) with an atomic number of 15, that exists in several allotropic forms.

pic.definition: A picture, especially a photographic image.

pick.definition: A tool used for digging; a pickaxe.

piece.definition: A part of a larger whole, usually in such a form that it is able to be separated from other parts.

pier.gloss: raised platform built from the shore out over water
pier.definition: A raised platform built from the shore out over water, supported on piles; used to secure, or provide access to shipping; a jetty.

pique.definition: A feeling of enmity; ill-feeling, animosity; a transient feeling of wounded pride.

pistil.gloss: discrete organ in the center of a flower capable of receiving pollen and producing a fruit
pistil.definition: A discrete organ in the center of a flower capable of receiving pollen and producing a fruit, it is divided into an ovary, style and stigma.

pistol.definition: A handgun, typically with a chamber integrated in the barrel, a semi-automatic action and a box magazine.

plait.definition: A flat fold; a doubling, as of cloth; a pleat.

planar.gloss: of or pertaining to a plane
planar.definition: Of or pertaining to a plane.

planer.gloss: of a surface flat or level
planer.definition: Of a surface: flat or level.

plate.gloss: slightly curved but almost flat dish from which food is served or eaten
plate.definition: A slightly curved but almost flat dish from which food is served or eaten.

plumb.definition: A little mass of lead, or the like, attached to a line, and used by builders, etc., to indicate a vertical direction.

poky.gloss: gambling device based on the card game poker
poky.definition: A gambling device based on the card game poker.

pole.definition: Originally, a stick; now specifically, a long and slender piece of metal or (especially) wood, used for various construction or support purposes.

poll.definition: A survey of people, usually statistically analyzed to gauge wider public opinion.

populace.definition: The common people of a nation.

pore.definition: A tiny opening in the skin.

poser.definition: A particularly difficult question or puzzle.

poseur.definition: One who affects some behaviour, style, attitude or other condition, often to impress or influence others.

practice.gloss: repetition of an activity to improve a skill
practice.definition: Repetition of an activity to improve a skill.

practise.gloss: to repeat as a way of improving one s skill in that activity
practise.definition: To repeat (an activity) as a way of improving one's skill in that activity.

pray.gloss: to direct words and or thoughts to god or any higher being
pray.definition: To direct words and/or thoughts to God or any higher being, for the sake of adoration, thanks, petition for help, etc.

prey.definition: Anything, as goods, etc., taken or got by violence; anything taken by force from an enemy in war

principal.definition: The money originally invested or loaned, on which basis interest and returns are calculated.

principle.definition: A fundamental assumption or guiding belief.

prior.gloss: high ranking member of a monastery
prior.definition: A high-ranking member of a monastery, usually lower in rank than an abbot.

prof.gloss: most senior rank for an academic at a university or similar institution
prof.definition: The most senior rank for an academic at a university or similar institution, informally also known as "full professor." Abbreviated Prof.

professor.gloss: most senior rank for an academic at a university or similar institution
professor.definition: The most senior rank for an academic at a university or similar institution, informally also known as "full professor." Abbreviated Prof.

profit.gloss: total income or cash flow minus expenditures the money or other benefit a non governmental organization or individual receives in exchange for products and services sold at an advertised price
profit.definition: Total income or cash flow minus expenditures. The money or other benefit a non-governmental organization or individual receives in exchange for products and services sold at an advertised price.

prophet.gloss: someone who speaks by divine inspiration
prophet.definition: Someone who speaks by divine inspiration.

psi.gloss: twenty third letter of classical and modern greek and the twenty fifth letter of old and ancient greek
psi.definition: The twenty-third letter of Classical and Modern Greek and the twenty-fifth letter of Old and Ancient Greek.

pus.gloss: whitish yellow or yellow substance composed primarily of dead white blood cells and dead pyogenic bacteria
pus.definition: A whitish-yellow or yellow substance composed primarily of dead white blood cells and dead pyogenic bacteria; normally found in regions of bacterial infection.

puss.definition: (often as a term of address) A cat.

quaff.definition: The act of quaffing; a deep draught.

quay.gloss: stone or concrete structure on navigable water used for loading and unloading vessels
quay.definition: A stone or concrete structure on navigable water used for loading and unloading vessels; a wharf.

rack.gloss: series of one or more shelves
rack.definition: A series of one or more shelves, stacked one above the other

rah.gloss: person with a posh accent who looks down on those who are common
rah.definition: A person (especially a student) with a posh accent who looks down on those who are "common".

rain.gloss: condensed water falling from a cloud
rain.definition: Condensed water falling from a cloud.

raise.definition: An increase in wages or salary; a rise (UK).

raiser.definition: A person or thing that raises.

rap.definition: A sharp blow with something hard.

rapped.gloss: to strike something sharply with one s knuckles
rapped.definition: To strike something sharply with one's knuckles; knock.

rapper.definition: One who, or that which, raps or knocks.

rapping.gloss: to strike something sharply with one s knuckles
rapping.definition: To strike something sharply with one's knuckles; knock.

raw.definition: (sugar refining, sugar trade) An unprocessed sugar; a batch of such.

raze.definition: To demolish; to level to the ground.

razor.gloss: keen edged knife of peculiar shape
razor.definition: A keen-edged knife of peculiar shape, used in shaving the hair from the face or other parts of the body.

read.gloss: reading or an act of reading
read.definition: A reading or an act of reading, especially an actor's part of a play.

readout.definition: A display that presents numerical data.

red.gloss: any of a range of colours having the longest wavelengths
red.definition: Any of a range of colours having the longest wavelengths, 670 nm, of the visible spectrum; a primary additive colour for transmitted light: the colour obtained by subtracting green and blue from white light using magenta and yellow filters; the colour of blood, ripe strawberries, etc.

rein.gloss: strap or rope attached to a bridle or bit
rein.definition: A strap or rope attached to a bridle or bit, used to control a horse, animal or young child.

repelling.gloss: to turn away from a privilege
repelling.definition: To turn (someone) away from a privilege, right, job, etc.

rest.gloss: relief from work or activity by sleeping
rest.definition: (of a person or animal) Relief from work or activity by sleeping; sleep.

rho.gloss: seventeenth letter of the modern greek and classical alphabets and the nineteenth letter of old and ancient
rho.definition: The seventeenth letter of the Modern Greek and Classical alphabets and the nineteenth letter of Old and Ancient.

rime.gloss: ice formed by the rapid freezing of cold water droplets of fog on to a cold surface
rime.definition: Ice formed by the rapid freezing of cold water droplets of fog on to a cold surface.

ring.gloss: solid object in the shape of a circle
ring.definition: (physical) A solid object in the shape of a circle.

ringer.definition: Someone who rings, especially a bell ringer.

road.gloss: way used for travelling between places
road.definition: A way used for travelling between places, originally one wide enough to allow foot passengers and horses to travel, now (US) usually one surfaced with asphalt or concrete and designed to accommodate many vehicles travelling in both directions. In the UK both senses are heard: a country road is the same as a country lane.

rode.gloss: to transport oneself by sitting on and directing a horse
rode.definition: To transport oneself by sitting on and directing a horse, later also a bicycle etc.

role.gloss: character or part played by a performer or actor
role.definition: A character or part played by a performer or actor.

roll.definition: The act or result of rolling, or state of being rolled.

rood.definition: A crucifix, cross, especially in a church.

root.definition: The part of a plant, generally underground, that anchors and supports the plant body, absorbs and stores water and nutrients, and in some plants is able to perform vegetative reproduction.

rooter.definition: One who, or that which, roots; one that tears up by the roots.

rote.definition: Mechanical routine; a fixed, habitual, repetitive, or mechanical course of procedure.

rough.gloss: unmowed part of a golf course
rough.definition: The unmowed part of a golf course.

route.gloss: course or way which is traveled or passed
route.definition: A course or way which is traveled or passed.

router.gloss: someone who routes or directs items from one location to another
router.definition: Someone who routes or directs items from one location to another.

roux.gloss: mixture of fat and flour used to thicken sauces and stews
roux.definition: A mixture of fat (usually butter) and flour used to thicken sauces and stews.

row.definition: A line of objects, often regularly spaced, such as seats in a theatre, vegetable plants in a garden etc.

ruff.gloss: circular frill or ruffle on a garment
ruff.definition: A circular frill or ruffle on a garment, especially a starched, fluted frill at the neck in Elizabethan and Jacobean England (1560s–1620s).

rung.gloss: crosspiece forming a step of a ladder
rung.definition: A crosspiece forming a step of a ladder; a round.

rye.gloss: grain used extensively in europe for making bread
rye.definition: A grain used extensively in Europe for making bread, beer, and (now generally) for animal fodder.

sac.gloss: bag or pouch inside a plant or animal that typically contains a fluid
sac.definition: A bag or pouch inside a plant or animal that typically contains a fluid.

sack.definition: A bag; especially a large bag of strong, coarse material for storage and handling of various commodities, such as potatoes, coal, coffee; or, a bag with handles used at a supermarket, a grocery sack; or, a small bag for small items, a satchel.

sail.gloss: piece of fabric attached to a boat and arranged such that it causes the wind to drive the boat along the sail may be attached to the boat via a combination of mast
sail.definition: A piece of fabric attached to a boat and arranged such that it causes the wind to drive the boat along. The sail may be attached to the boat via a combination of mast, spars and ropes.

sane.definition: Being in a healthy condition; not deranged; thinking rationally.

sari.gloss: traditional dress of women in the indian subcontinent
sari.definition: The traditional dress of women in the Indian Subcontinent; an outer garment consisting of a single length of cotton or silk, most often with one end wrapped around the waist to form a skirt, the other draped over the shoulder or head.

scene.gloss: location of an event that attracts attention
scene.definition: The location of an event that attracts attention.

schilling.definition: The old currency of Austria, divided into 100 groschen

scull.gloss: single oar mounted at the stern of a boat and moved from side to side to propel the boat forward
scull.definition: A single oar mounted at the stern of a boat and moved from side to side to propel the boat forward.

sea.definition: A large body of salt water.

seam.gloss: folded back and stitched piece of fabric
seam.definition: A folded-back and stitched piece of fabric; especially, the stitching that joins two or more pieces of fabric.

seaman.definition: A mariner or sailor, one who mans a ship. Opposed to landman or landsman.

see.gloss: to perceive or detect with the eyes
see.definition: (stative) To perceive or detect with the eyes, or as if by sight.

seed.definition: A fertilized and ripened ovule, containing an embryonic plant.

seem.definition: To appear; to look outwardly; to be perceived as.

seen.gloss: to perceive or detect with the eyes
seen.definition: (stative) To perceive or detect with the eyes, or as if by sight.

seine.gloss: long net having floats attached at the top and sinkers at the bottom
seine.definition: A long net having floats attached at the top and sinkers (weights) at the bottom, used in shallow water for catching fish.

semen.definition: A sticky, milky fluid produced in male reproductive organs that contains the reproductive cells.

senor.gloss: spanish term of address equivalent to sir or mr
senor.definition: A Spanish term of address equivalent to sir or Mr., used alone or capitalized and prefixed to the name of a married or an older man.

sensor.gloss: device or organ that detects certain external stimuli and responds in a distinctive manner
sensor.definition: A device or organ that detects certain external stimuli and responds in a distinctive manner.

sent.definition: A subdivision of currency, equal to one hundredth of an Estonian kroon.

serf.gloss: partially free peasant of a low hereditary class
serf.definition: A partially free peasant of a low hereditary class, attached like a slave to the land owned by a feudal lord and required to perform labour, enjoying minimal legal or customary rights

serial.definition: A work, such as a work of fiction, published in installments, often numbered and without a specified end.

sew.gloss: to use a needle to pass thread repeatedly through in order to join them together
sew.definition: To use a needle to pass thread repeatedly through (pieces of fabric) in order to join them together.

sewn.gloss: to use a needle to pass thread repeatedly through in order to join them together
sewn.definition: To use a needle to pass thread repeatedly through (pieces of fabric) in order to join them together.

shear.definition: A cutting tool similar to scissors, but often larger.

sheikh.definition: The leader of an Arab village, family or small tribe.

shew.definition: A play, dance, or other entertainment.

shilling.gloss: coin formerly used in the united kingdom
shilling.definition: A coin formerly used in the United Kingdom, Ireland, Malta, Australia, New Zealand and many other Commonwealth countries.

shoe.definition: A protective covering for the foot, with a bottom part composed of thick leather or plastic sole and often a thicker heel, and a softer upper part made of leather or synthetic material. Shoes generally do not extend above the ankle, as opposed to boots, which do.

shoo.gloss: to induce someone or something to leave
shoo.definition: To induce someone or something to leave.

shoot.gloss: emerging stem and embryonic leaves of a new plant
shoot.definition: The emerging stem and embryonic leaves of a new plant.

shop.gloss: establishment that sells goods or services to the public
shop.definition: An establishment that sells goods or services to the public; originally only a physical location, but now a virtual establishment as well.

shoppe.definition: (sometimes capitalized) A fanciful spelling of shop, chiefly used in the names of businesses to give an air of old-fashionedness.

shown.definition: To display, to have somebody see (something).

sic.gloss: to mark with a bracketed sic
sic.definition: To mark with a bracketed sic.

sick.gloss: sick people in general as a group
sick.definition: Sick people in general as a group.

sigh.definition: A deep, prolonged audible inhale and exhale of breath; as when fatigued, frustrated, grieved, or relieved; the act of sighing.

sighs.definition: A deep, prolonged audible inhale and exhale of breath; as when fatigued, frustrated, grieved, or relieved; the act of sighing.

sight.definition: (in the singular) The ability to see.

sign.definition: (sometimes also used uncountably) A visible indication.

signor.gloss: courtesy title for a man of italian origin
signor.definition: A courtesy title for a man of Italian origin.

sin.gloss: violation of god s will or religious law
sin.definition: A violation of God's will or religious law.

sine.definition: In a right triangle, the ratio of the length of the side opposite an angle to the length of the hypotenuse.

sink.gloss: basin used for holding water for washing
sink.definition: A basin used for holding water for washing.

skull.gloss: main bones of the head considered as a unit
skull.definition: The main bones of the head considered as a unit; including the cranium, facial bones, and mandible.

sleigh.definition: A vehicle, generally pulled by an animal, which moves over snow or ice on runners, used for transporting persons or goods. (contrast "sled", which is smaller)

slight.definition: The act of slighting; a deliberate act of neglect or discourtesy.

sloe.definition: The small, bitter, wild fruit of the blackthorn (Prunus spinosa).

slow.definition: Someone who is slow; a sluggard.

sol.gloss: fifth step in the solf ge scale of c
sol.definition: The fifth step in the solfège scale of C (Ut), preceded by fa and followed by la.

sonny.gloss: familiar form of address for a boy
sonny.definition: A familiar form of address for a boy

sore.definition: An injured, infected, inflamed or diseased patch of skin.

sorry.definition: The act of saying sorry; an apology.

sough.definition: A murmuring sound; rushing, rustling, or whistling sound.

sought.definition: To try to find; to look for; to search for.

soul.gloss: spirit or essence of a person usually thought to consist of one s thoughts and personality often believed to live on after the person s death
soul.definition: The spirit or essence of a person usually thought to consist of one's thoughts and personality. Often believed to live on after the person's death.

spec.definition: A special place (for hiding or viewing)

speck.definition: A tiny spot, especially of dirt etc.

spring.definition: To weaken, as a joint, ligament, or muscle, by sudden and excessive exertion, as by wrenching; to overstrain, or stretch injuriously, but without luxation

staff.definition: (plural staffs or staves) A long, straight, thick wooden rod or stick, especially one used to assist in walking.

stair.definition: A single step in a staircase.

stake.gloss: piece of wood or other material
stake.definition: A piece of wood or other material, usually long and slender, pointed at one end so as to be easily driven into the ground as a marker or a support or stay.

staph.gloss: staphylococcus bacteria and the infection it causes
staph.definition: Staphylococcus bacteria and the infection it causes.

stationary.definition: One who, or that which, is stationary, such as a planet when apparently it has neither progressive nor retrograde motion.

steak.definition: Beefsteak, a slice of beef, broiled or cut for broiling.

steel.definition: An artificial metal produced from iron, harder and more elastic than elemental iron; used figuratively as a symbol of hardness.

step.gloss: advance or movement made from one foot to the other
step.definition: An advance or movement made from one foot to the other; a pace.

steppe.gloss: grasslands of eastern europe and asia similar to prairie and savanna
steppe.definition: The grasslands of Eastern Europe and Asia. Similar to (North American) prairie and (African) savanna.

stile.gloss: set of one or more steps surmounting a fence or wall
stile.definition: A set of one or more steps surmounting a fence or wall, or a narrow gate or contrived passage through a fence or wall, which in either case allows people but not livestock to pass.

stoop.gloss: staircase and landing or porch leading to the entrance of a residence
stoop.definition: The staircase and landing or porch leading to the entrance of a residence.

story.gloss: sequence of real or fictional events
story.definition: A sequence of real or fictional events; or, an account of such a sequence.

straight.gloss: something that is not crooked or bent such as a part of a road or track
straight.definition: Something that is not crooked or bent such as a part of a road or track.

strait.gloss: narrow channel of water connecting two larger bodies of water
strait.definition: A narrow channel of water connecting two larger bodies of water.

style.definition: Senses relating to a thin, pointed object.

suede.definition: A type of soft leather, made from calfskin, with a brushed texture to resemble fabric, often used to make boots, clothing and fashion accessories.

suite.definition: A retinue or company of attendants, as of a distinguished personage

sum.gloss: quantity obtained by addition or aggregation
sum.definition: A quantity obtained by addition or aggregation.

sun.definition: A star, especially when seen as the centre of any single solar system.

surf.gloss: waves that break on an ocean shoreline
surf.definition: Waves that break on an ocean shoreline.

surge.definition: A sudden transient rush, flood or increase.

swayed.gloss: to move or swing from side to side
swayed.definition: To move or swing from side to side; or backward and forward; to rock.

sweet.gloss: basic taste sensation induced by sugar
sweet.definition: The basic taste sensation induced by sugar.

symbol.gloss: character or glyph representing an idea
symbol.definition: A character or glyph representing an idea, concept or object.

syn.gloss: that has a torsion angle between 0 and 90
syn.definition: That has a torsion angle between 0° and 90°.

tail.gloss: caudal appendage of an animal that is attached to its posterior and near the anus
tail.definition: The caudal appendage of an animal that is attached to its posterior and near the anus.

tale.gloss: account of an asserted fact or circumstance
tale.definition: An account of an asserted fact or circumstance; a rumour; a report, especially an idle or malicious story; a piece of gossip or slander; a lie.

talkie.definition: A movie with sound, as opposed to a silent film.

taught.definition: To show (someone) the way; to guide, conduct; to point, indicate.

taut.definition: To make taut; to tauten, to tighten.

tea.gloss: drug smoked or ingested for euphoric effect
tea.definition: A drug smoked or ingested for euphoric effect, cannabis.

team.definition: A set of draught animals, such as two horses in front of a carriage.

tee.gloss: name of the latin script letter t
tee.definition: The name of the Latin-script letter T.

tenner.gloss: monetary note whose face value is ten basic units of currency originally
tenner.definition: A monetary note (bill) whose face value is ten basic units of currency. Originally, a ten-shilling (half pound) note.

tenor.gloss: musical range or section higher than bass and lower than alto
tenor.definition: A musical range or section higher than bass and lower than alto.

terry.gloss: type of coarse cotton fabric covered in many small raised loops that is used to make towels
terry.definition: A type of coarse cotton fabric covered in many small raised loops that is used to make towels, bathrobes and some types of nappy/diaper.

the.gloss: with a comparative or with more and a verb phrase
the.definition: With a comparative or with more and a verb phrase, establishes a correlation with one or more other such comparatives.

thee.gloss: to address using the pronoun thee
thee.definition: To address (a person) using the pronoun thee.

throne.gloss: impressive seat used by a monarch
throne.definition: An impressive seat used by a monarch, often on a raised dais in a throne room and reserved for formal occasions.

through.gloss: large slab of stone laid in a dry stone wall from one side to the other
through.definition: A large slab of stone laid in a dry-stone wall from one side to the other; a perpend.

thyme.gloss: any plant of the labiate genus thymus
thyme.definition: Any plant of the labiate genus Thymus, such as the garden thyme, Thymus vulgaris, a warm, pungent aromatic, that is much used to give a relish to seasoning and soups.

tic.definition: A sudden, nonrhythmic motor movement or vocalization.

tick.gloss: tiny woodland arachnid of the suborder ixodida
tick.definition: A tiny woodland arachnid of the suborder Ixodida.

time.gloss: inevitable progression into the future with the passing of present and past events
time.definition: The inevitable progression into the future with the passing of present and past events.

titan.gloss: something or someone of very large stature
titan.definition: Something or someone of very large stature, greatness, or godliness.

toe.gloss: each of the five digits on the end of the foot
toe.definition: Each of the five digits on the end of the foot.

tole.gloss: decorative metalware having a lacquered or enamelled surface that is painted or gilded
tole.definition: A decorative metalware having a lacquered or enamelled surface that is painted or gilded

toll.gloss: loss or damage incurred through a disaster
toll.definition: Loss or damage incurred through a disaster.

ton.gloss: unit of weight equal to 2240 pounds or 2000 pounds or 1000 kilograms
ton.definition: A unit of weight (mass) equal to 2240 pounds (a long ton) or 2000 pounds (a short ton) or 1000 kilograms (a metric ton).

tonne.gloss: metric unit of mass equal to 1000 kilograms symbol t
tonne.definition: A metric unit of mass equal to 1000 kilograms. Symbol: t

topography.definition: A precise description of a place.

tray.definition: A small, typically rectangular or round, flat, and rigid object upon which things are carried.

trey.gloss: playing card or die with the rank of three
trey.definition: A playing card or die with the rank of three.

troop.definition: (collective) A collection of people; a number; a multitude (in general).

troupe.definition: A company of, often touring, actors, singers or dancers.

trustee.gloss: person to whom property is legally committed in trust
trustee.definition: A person to whom property is legally committed in trust, to be applied either for the benefit of specified individuals, or for public uses; one who is intrusted with property for the benefit of another.

trusty.definition: A trusted person, especially a prisoner who has been granted special privileges.

turbot.gloss: species of flatfish native to europe
turbot.definition: A species of flatfish native to Europe (Scophthalmus maximus, earlier Psetta maxima).

typography.gloss: art or practice of setting and arranging type
typography.definition: The art or practice of setting and arranging type; typesetting.

undo.gloss: operation that reverses a previous action
undo.definition: An operation that reverses a previous action.

undue.definition: Excessive; going beyond that what is natural or sufficient.

urn.definition: A vase with a footed base.

vain.definition: Overly proud of oneself, especially concerning appearance; having a high opinion of one's own accomplishments with slight reason.

veil.gloss: something hung up or spread out to hide or protect the face
veil.definition: Something hung up or spread out to hide or protect the face, or hide an object from view; usually of gauze, crepe, or similar diaphanous material.

vein.gloss: blood vessel that transports blood from the capillaries back to the heart
vein.definition: A blood vessel that transports blood from the capillaries back to the heart.

vise.definition: An instrument consisting of two jaws, closing by a screw, lever, cam, or the like, for holding work, as in filing.

wack.definition: An eccentric; an oddball; a weirdo.

wail.definition: A prolonged cry, usually high-pitched, especially as of grief or anguish.

wailing.definition: To cry out, as in sorrow or anguish.

wain.definition: A wagon; a four-wheeled cart for hauling loads, usually pulled by horses or oxen.

waist.gloss: part of the body between the pelvis and the stomach
waist.definition: The part of the body between the pelvis and the stomach.

waive.definition: To relinquish (a right etc.); to give up claim to; to forego.

waiver.definition: The act of waiving, or not insisting on, some right, claim, or privilege.

walk.gloss: to move on the feet by alternately setting each foot forward
walk.definition: To move on the feet by alternately setting each foot (or pair or group of feet, in the case of animals with four or more feet) forward, with at least one foot on the ground at all times. Compare run.

wan.definition: The quality of being wan; wanness.

wane.definition: A gradual diminution in power, value, intensity etc.

war.definition: Organized, large-scale, armed conflict between countries or between national, ethnic, or other sizeable groups, usually involving the engagement of military forces.

ware.definition: The state of being aware; heed.

warn.definition: To make (someone) aware of (something impending); especially:

wary.definition: Cautious of danger; carefully watching and guarding against deception, trickery, and dangers; suspiciously prudent

waste.definition: Excess of material, useless by-products or damaged, unsaleable products; garbage; rubbish.

wave.gloss: to move back and forth repeatedly and somewhat loosely
wave.definition: To move back and forth repeatedly and somewhat loosely.

waver.definition: An act of wavering, vacillating, etc.

way.gloss: to do with a place or places
way.definition: (heading) To do with a place or places.

weak.definition: Lacking in force (usually strength) or ability.

weary.gloss: to make or to become weary
weary.definition: To make or to become weary.

weather.gloss: short term state of the atmosphere at a specific time and place
weather.definition: The short term state of the atmosphere at a specific time and place, including the temperature, relative humidity, cloud cover, precipitation, wind, etc.

wed.gloss: to perform the marriage ceremony for
wed.definition: To perform the marriage ceremony for; to join in matrimony.

weed.gloss: any plant regarded as unwanted at the place where
weed.definition: Any plant regarded as unwanted at the place where, and at the time when it is growing.

week.gloss: any period of seven consecutive days
week.definition: Any period of seven consecutive days.

weigh.gloss: to determine the weight of an object
weigh.definition: To determine the weight of an object.

weir.gloss: adjustable dam placed across a river to regulate the flow of water downstream
weir.definition: An adjustable dam placed across a river to regulate the flow of water downstream.

whale.gloss: any of several species of large sea mammals of the infraorder cetacea
whale.definition: Any of several species of large sea mammals of the infraorder Cetacea.

wheel.gloss: circular device capable of rotating on its axis
wheel.definition: A circular device capable of rotating on its axis, facilitating movement or transportation or performing labour in machines.

when.definition: The time at which something happens.

where.definition: The place in which something happens.

wherry.gloss: light ship used to navigate inland waterways
wherry.definition: A light ship used to navigate inland waterways.

whew.gloss: to whistle with a shrill pipe
whew.definition: To whistle with a shrill pipe, like a plover.

whey.gloss: liquid remaining after milk has been curdled and strained in the process of making cheese
whey.definition: The liquid remaining after milk has been curdled and strained in the process of making cheese.

which.definition: (interrogative) What one or ones (of those mentioned or implied).

while.definition: An uncertain duration of time, a period of time.

whine.definition: A long-drawn, high-pitched complaining cry or sound

whit.definition: The smallest part or particle imaginable; an iota.

white.gloss: color colour of snow or milk
white.definition: The color/colour of snow or milk; the colour of light containing equal amounts of all visible wavelengths.

whoa.gloss: to attempt to slow by crying whoa
whoa.definition: To attempt to slow (an animal) by crying "whoa".

whole.definition: Something complete, without any parts missing.

wholly.definition: Completely and entirely; to the fullest extent.

wiener.definition: A sausage made from beef, chicken or pork.

wight.definition: A living creature, especially a human being.

will.definition: (now uncommon or literary) To wish, desire (something).

wine.gloss: alcoholic beverage made by fermenting the juice of grapes
wine.definition: An alcoholic beverage made by fermenting the juice of grapes.

witch.definition: A person who practices witchcraft; a woman or man who practices witchcraft.

wither.definition: To shrivel, droop or dry up, especially from lack of water.

woe.definition: Great sadness or distress; a misfortune causing such sadness.

wok.definition: A large, oriental, round-bottomed cooking pan.

woo.gloss: to endeavor to gain someone s support
woo.definition: To endeavor to gain someone's support.

wood.gloss: substance making up the central part of the trunk and branches of a tree used as a material for construction
wood.definition: The substance making up the central part of the trunk and branches of a tree. Used as a material for construction, to manufacture various items, etc. or as fuel.

wore.gloss: to carry or have equipped on or about one s body
wore.definition: To carry or have equipped on or about one's body, as an item of clothing, equipment, decoration, etc.

worn.gloss: to carry or have equipped on or about one s body
worn.definition: To carry or have equipped on or about one's body, as an item of clothing, equipment, decoration, etc.

would.definition: Something that would happen, or would be the case, under different circumstances; a potentiality.

wrack.definition: Vengeance; revenge; persecution; punishment; consequence; trouble.

wrap.gloss: to enclose completely in any flexible
wrap.definition: To enclose (an object) completely in any flexible, thin material such as fabric or paper.

wrapped.gloss: to enclose completely in any flexible
wrapped.definition: To enclose (an object) completely in any flexible, thin material such as fabric or paper.

wrapper.gloss: something that is wrapped around something else as a cover or protection a wrapping
wrapper.definition: Something that is wrapped around something else as a cover or protection: a wrapping.

wrapping.gloss: material in which something is wrapped
wrapping.definition: The material in which something is wrapped.

wreak.definition: To cause something harmful; to afflict; to inflict; to harm or injury; to let out something harmful; .

wreck.gloss: something or someone that has been ruined
wreck.definition: Something or someone that has been ruined.

wrest.definition: The act of wresting; a wrench or twist; distortion.

wright.definition: A builder or maker of something.

wring.definition: A powerful squeezing or twisting action.

write.definition: The act or style of writing.

wrote.definition: To form letters, words or symbols on a surface in order to communicate.

wrung.gloss: to squeeze or twist tightly so that liquid is forced out see also wring out
wrung.definition: To squeeze or twist (something) tightly so that liquid is forced out. See also wring out.

yew.definition: A species of coniferous tree, Taxus baccata, with dark-green flat needle-like leaves and seeds bearing red arils, native to western, central and southern Europe, northwest Africa, northern Iran and southwest Asia.

yoke.definition: Frame around the neck, and related senses.

yolk.definition: The yellow, spherical part of an egg that is surrounded by the white albumen, and serves as nutriment for the growing young.

you.gloss: to address using the pronoun you
you.definition: To address (a person) using the pronoun you (in the past, especially to use you rather than thou, when you was considered more formal).

yuk.definition: Something, such as a joke, that causes such a laugh.
